testcase.name: test_teach_ms_language
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:574: in test_teach_ms_language assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"AI error: Error code: 429 - {'error': {'message': 'Rate limit reached for model `llama-3.3-70b-versatile` in organization `org_01kpnncy8aewsr060yph7xkdmh` service tier `on_demand` on tokens per day (TPD): Limit 100000, Used 99030, Requested 1055. Please try again in 1m13.44s. Need more tokens? Upgrade to Dev Tier today at https://console.groq.com/settings/billing', 'type': 'tokens', 'code': 'rate_limit_exceeded'}}"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_intervention_cache_returns_dict_not_tuple
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:619: in test_intervention_cache_returns_dict_not_tuple assert r1.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
